import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from datetime import time
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

ES_PATH = '/Users/thrill3r/Downloads/Tomac/es future 2021-2025/glbx-mdp3-20110101-20251231.ohlcv-1m.csv'
CONTRACT = {'multiplier': 50.0, 'tick': 0.25, 'commission': 4.10, 'max_daily_loss': 2000}
RISK_REWARD = 1.5
BE_TRIGGER_R = 1.0  # Sweet spot: 2/3 of target
ATR_STOP_MULT = 2.0
FRACTAL_DIST = 3
WPR_OVERBOUGHT = -20
WPR_OVERSOLD = -80
TRADING_WINDOWS = [(time(9, 30), time(11, 30)), (time(13, 30), time(16, 0))]

def scrub_data(df):
    df = df[(df['high'] >= df['low']) & (df['close'] > 100)].copy()
    df['bar_range'] = df['high'] - df['low']
    df = df[df['bar_range'] <= 40.0].copy()
    df['range_ma'] = df['bar_range'].rolling(60).mean()
    df['range_std'] = df['bar_range'].rolling(60).std()
    df = df[df['bar_range'] < (df['range_ma'] + 5.0 * df['range_std'])].copy()
    return df.drop(columns=['bar_range', 'range_ma', 'range_std'])

def calc_features(df):
    tr = pd.concat([df['high'] - df['low'], (df['high'] - df['close'].shift(1)).abs(),
                    (df['low'] - df['close'].shift(1)).abs()], axis=1).max(axis=1)
